e.v: Proprietatea se transfera imediat dupa acceptare.
Puteti vinde articolele finantate oricand. Soldul ramas trebuie platit din incasarile vanzarii.
Choose your cauta scope. Higher tiers cost more si take longer, but have better succes rates si match quality.
Cauta nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 luna response, 2% cost, 40% success rata.
Cauta regional network. 1-3 luni, 6% cost, 70% success rata.
Cauta nationwide. 2-6 luni, 12% cost, 85% success rata.
Lower quality = cheaper pret but more repairs needed
Nu active finantare sau leasing deals.
Finantare vehicles de la the shop (F key). Cauta pentru uzat echipament (V key). Payments are automatically deducted lunar.
Teren finantare typically offers lower dobanda rates.
Teren ownership transfers immediately. You can use the camp right away.
Avertisment: Failure la make lunar payments may result in teren seizure.
Cauta pentru %s esuat. Nu matches gasit.
Your agent was unable la find a %s matching your criteria. The cauta fee is non-refundable. You may start a nou cauta if desired.
MISSED LEASING PLATA: Unable la pay %s pentru %s
%s sold. Finantare sold din %s paid de la proceeds.
Esuat la start cauta. Please try again.
Insufficient funds pentru leasing termination. Obligatoriu: %s
Cannot vinde leased vehicul. End leasing first sau wait until leasing expires.
Cannot vinde. Ramas sold (%s) exceeds sale pret (%s).
Maximum %d vehicles can be listed pentru sale la once. Wait pentru a sale la complete sau anuleaza a listing.
Bargain bin - may be inoperable sau need extensive repairs
Cel mai ieftin functional - poate necesita reparatii semnificative
Credit score affects your dobanda rata. Improve it by maintaining a low datorie-la-asset ratio.
Higher Avans reduces lunar payments si may lower dobanda rata.
Bani inapoi is deducted de la Avans. Increases suma financed.
You can pay off your imprumut early la salveaza pe dobanda. Prepayment penalties may aplica.
Keep leased vehicles in bun stare la avoid return penalties.
Spread payments over 1-20 ani. Longer terms = smaller lunar payments but more total dobanda paid.
Pay upfront la reduce imprumut suma. Higher Avans = lower dobanda rata si lunar plata. Range: 0-50%.
Receive cash immediately (added la your imprumut). Useful pentru operating expenses, but increases lunar payments si total cost.
Deducted de la your farm account automatically every in-game luna. Ensure you have enough money!
Extra cost din finantare vs. paying cash. This is what you pay pentru spreading payments over time.
Achizitie pret + total dobanda = what you'll actually pay over the entire imprumut durata.
Anual percentage charged pe your imprumut. Based pe credit score si Avans. Lower is better!
Your farm's financial rating (300-850). Higher score = lower rates. Improve by keeping datorie low si paying pe time.
Leasing pentru 1-5 ani, then return vehicul sau pay valoare reziduala la keep it. Shorter terms = higher lunar payments.
Upfront plata. Lower maximum (20%) than finantare because you don't own the vehicul yet.
Suma la pay la leasing end if you want la keep the vehicul. Based pe estimated depreciation. Return vehicul instead la pay nothing extra (if in bun stare).
Deducted automatically each luna during leasing durata. Lower than finantare payments because you don't pay full vehicul valoare.
Avans + toate lunar payments. Does NOT include valoare reziduala if you choose la cumpara la end.
Anual percentage pentru leasing. Higher than finantare rates (5.5% vs 4.5%) because din higher lender risk.
La leasing end: daune >10% or uzura >15% = penalties up la 30% of vehicul pret. Keep vehicul maintained!
Cauta nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 luna response, 2% cost, 40% success. Fast si cheap.
Cauta regional network. 1-3 luni, 6% cost, 70% success. Bun sold pentru most searches.
Cauta nationwide. 2-6 luni, 12% cost, 85% success. Best pentru rare echipament.
Upfront fee deducted immediately. Non-refundable even if cauta fails.
In-game luni until rezultate. You'll get a notification when cauta completes.
Probability din finding this tip din echipament in uzat stare la toate.
Total suma you still owe across toate loans si leases. Keep below your asset valoare!
Total deducted de la your account each luna. Ensure you always have enough cash flow!
300-850 rating. 750+ = Excelent, 650-749 = Bun, 550-649 = Acceptabil, &amp;amp;amp;amp;lt;550 = Slab. Affects toate future dobanda rates!
Combined valoare din vehicles, echipament, fields, si buildings you own. Should be higher than your datorie!
Total Datorie ÷ Asset Valoare. Keep below 30% for excelent credit. Above 50% hurts your score significantly!
Portion din original imprumut you've paid inapoi. This reduces your sold.
Extra cost you've paid so far pentru borrowing money. This does NOT reduce your sold.
Total dobanda you'll pay if you continua minimum lunar payments. Pay extra now la reduce this!
One-time fee pentru paying off early (usually 1-3% of sold). Charged because lender loses future dobanda income.
Suma you still owe (principal only). Paying extra reduces this faster!
Shows how your plata divides: Principal (pays down sold) vs Dobanda (borrowing cost).
Your credit score determines your maximum borrowing limit si dobanda rata.
Collateral is calculated de la 50% of vehicul values si 60% of teren values.
Imprumut approved! %s deposited la your account.
Imprumut denied. Insufficient collateral sau slab credit.
This vehicul does not need repairs.
Based pe assets vs datorie ratio
Select a vehicul la schimb in:
Nu vehicles eligible pentru schimb la cumparare
Schimb la cumparare valoare is 85% of vinde pret. Same-brand purchases get a 10% bonus.
Vehiculele finantate nu pot fi date la schimb
Tip: Make payments pe time la improve your credit score. Pay off loans early la salveaza pe dobanda.
50-65% instant valoare when purchasing a nou vehicul
Quick local sale. 1-2 luni, 85% success rata.
This vehicul is already listed pentru sale
Cannot vinde financed vehicles. Pay off sold first.
A cumparator has been gasit pentru your vehicul!
Oferta expired pentru %s. Agent continues searching...
Nu cumparator was gasit during the listing period.
You can relist this vehicul cu the same sau different agent/pret settings.
Nu cumparator gasit pentru %s. Agent fee (%s) was non-refundable.
Anuleaza sale listing pentru %s? Agent fee will NOT be refunded.
Motorul nu porneste - incearca din nou
Engine struggling - max speed reduced la %d%%!
Motorul nu poate mentine aceasta viteza!
MOTOR SUPRAINCALZIT! Lasa-l sa se raceasca!
Implement lowered due la hydraulic failure
Engine shows signs din hard use. Expect occasional stalling under incarca.
Hydraulic system uzat. Implements may drift when raised.
Probleme electrice detectate. Echipamentele se pot opri neasteptat.
Negociaza pret sau budget pentru repairs
Bun mechanical stare - proceed cu confidence
Nu sale listing in this row
Nu finantare tranzactie in this row
Cannot anuleaza - this listing is ready pentru achizitie
This cauta is nu longer active
Nu pending oferta pe this listing
Cannot anuleaza while oferta is pending. Accepta sau refuza first.
Cannot modify pret while an oferta is pending.
Invalid pret. Please enter a positive number.
Invalid suma. Please enter a positive number.
Insufficient funds. Need %s pentru lunar plata.
Nu active finantare deals la make payments pe
Nu active finantare deals la pay
Your credit score (%d) is below the minimum (%d) obligatoriu pentru %s.
Tip: Make pe-time payments pe existing loans la build credit.
Credit score too low pentru finantare. Your score: %d (need %d+). Build credit cu pe-time payments.
Credit score too low pentru leasing. Your score: %d (need %d+). Leasing requires better credit than finantare.
Credit score too low (%d). Need %d+ la finantare teren.
Credit score too low (%d). Need %d+ la finantare repairs.
Finanțarea clădirilor necesită credit Excelent (%d+).\nCreditul dvs: %d (%s)
Suma too small pentru finantare. Minimum: %s
Suma too small pentru leasing. Minimum: %s
Reparatie cost too small la finantare. Minimum: %s
Teren pret too small pentru finantare. Minimum: %s
Action not authorized pentru your farm
Aceasta functie este dezactivata in setari
You already have a leasing pe this teren
Clădirile nu pot fi închiriate. Utilizați opțiunile Cash sau Finance.
Oferta declined - agent will continua searching
Purchased %s - Visit shop la collect vehicul
Financed %s - Visit shop la collect vehicul
Teren leasing pentru %s has been terminated
Start making payments la build your istoric
Pay off early la salveaza pe dobanda.
Bun stare - acceptabil tranzactie la this pret
Acceptabil stare - negociaza sau budget pentru repairs
%s inspection complete pentru %s! View raport now.
Full detalii + DNA hint + reparatie estimate
This vehicul is in excelent stare cu nu maintenance concerns.
Select a imprumut above la change its plata mode
AVERTISMENT: Skipping payments will increase sold!
Early payoff saves you %s in dobanda!
Inspectii indisponibile pentru echipamente fara motor. Cumpara asa cum este.
Bonus Semnare: Include %s in valoare de %s
Insufficient funds! Need %s more. Try finantare sau leasing.
Insufficient funds pentru security deposit! Need %s more.
Use Financial Dashboard (ESC Menu) la take credit-based loans
Vanilla borrowing disabled. Open Financial Dashboard pentru credit-based loans.
Prices reflect vanzator's asking pret. Negociaza based pe inspection findings.
Tip: Make payments pe time la improve credit. Pay off loans early la salveaza pe dobanda.
The following items were repossessed due la missed payments:
Click la toggle assets as collateral (only unencumbered assets shown)
Imprumut funds deposited immediately. Payments auto-deducted lunar.
Payments auto-deducted lunar. Pe-time payments improve credit!
This repossession severely impacts your credit score. Future finantare will be more expensive sau denied.
Make timely payments la avoid future repossessions.
Choose how you want la pay: cash upfront, finantare over time, sau leasing cu lower payments.
Select a vehicul la schimb in si reduce your suma due.
Pay the full suma now. Schimb la cumparare valoare is deducted de la the total.
Spread payments over time. Adjust durata, Avans, si bani inapoi la find your ideal lunar plata.
Longer terms = lower lunar SI lower cumparare. Avans reduces suma due today.
Choose how you want la pay: cash upfront, finantare over time, sau leasing the teren.
Pay the full suma now la own the teren outright.
Finantare the teren achizitie cu lunar payments. Adjust durata si Avans below.
Leasing the teren cu lunar payments. Rata is based pe acreage si soil quality.
Higher tiers cost more but have better succes rates si find higher quality matches.
Vehicul has been inspected - view raport
Percentage din ramas daune la fix. 100% = restore la full stare.
Percentage din paint uzura la restore. 100% = fresh factory finish.
Pay now sau finantare over time cu lunar payments.
Hire an agent la find buyers. Higher-tier agents reach more buyers but charge more.
Agent searches pentru buyers. You receive offers la accepta sau refuza.
Agent fee is non-refundable. Vehicul remains yours until sold.
Your agent is now se cauta buyers.
You'll receive offers la accepta sau refuza as buyers are gasit.
May get better oferta, sau listing expires
Select a imprumut above la change its plata mode
Return la dealer, pay oricare daune penalties
Pay valoare reziduala, keep vehicul permanently
You must choose an option. Returning gives you your deposit inapoi. Cumparare uses your equity toward achizitie. Renewing extends the leasing cu equity applied la future cumparare.
Pay pe time la build credit
Enable credit scoring in UsedPlus settings la view your credit raport.
Regional searches oferta the best valoare pentru succes rata.
Higher Agent tiers have wider reach but longer wait times.
Start searches de la shop via 'Cauta Uzat'
Nu active searches. Start de la Shop.
Nu listings. Vinde de la Garage menu.
UsedPlus expands the vanilla economy cu realistic finantare, a uzat piata, si credit system.
Finantare sau leasing de la Shop. Schimb la cumparare old echipament. Vinde via agents pentru better returns than vanilla.
Shop → 'Cauta Uzat' la hire agents. LOCAL: 2%, 40%. REGIONAL: 6%, 70%. NATIONAL: 12%, 85%.
Higher tiers = wider cauta, better odds. Uzat vehicles have varying stare si ore.
Garage → List pentru Sale. Schimb la cumparare: 50-65%. Local: 60-75%. Regional: 75-90%. National: 90-100%.
Stare si ore affect valoare. Accepta/refuza offers de la this screen.
Determines dobanda rates si schimb la cumparare values. Improves through: pe-time payments, completing deals. Drops de la: missed payments, defaults.
Assets provide collateral but don't prove creditworthiness. Plata istoric matters most—inherited teren doesn't mean bun credit!
Shop → Finantare/Leasing/Cauta Uzat | Garage → List pentru Sale
Lunar payments auto-deduct. Early payoff saves dobanda.
Leasing allows teren use fara full achizitie.
Teren returns la piata la leasing end unless bought out.
Teren finantare has lower rates than vehicul loans.
Lunar payments auto-deduct. Pay off early la salveaza pe dobanda.
I'm genuinely surprised this made it la the lot.
Whoever assembled this should find a nou career.
I'd tell ya la run, but I reckon this thing couldn't catch ya anyway.
Aș aprinde niște tămâie înainte să scot asta din parcare.
Chestia asta are mai mult ghinion decât o fabrică de oglinzi sparte.
My cousin had one like this. Uzat it pentru a chicken coop after. That's about toate it was bun pentru.
Some machines just come off the line wrong. This is one din them.
My advice? Budget pentru a lot din shop visits.
Dacă mașinile ar putea fi blestemate, asta cu siguranță e.
Something ain't right cu this one. Can't explain it, but I feel it in my bones.
She'll run, but don't expect her la thank you pentru it.
This here's what we call a 'parts tractor' inapoi home.
Might want la keep your mechanic pe speed dial.
Bunicul meu ar fi numit-o 'mușcată de șarpe'.
Some tractors attract trouble like a lightning rod. This is one din 'em.
She's about as reliable as a screen door pe a submarine.
O să facă treaba. Pâna la urmă.
Not saying it's haunted, but I wouldn't leave it running alone la night.
Unele mașini poartă puțin karma rea. Asta are o atingere.
I've seen better put together by my nephew cu a wrench si some baling wire.
Standard factory quality. That's toate I can say.
Instinctul îmi spune că o să-ți dea câteva dureri de cap. De obicei are dreptate.
There's an old saying - some iron just don't want la cooperate.
În toată firea. Nimic remarcabil, nimic îngrijorător.
She'll give you acceptabil service pentru acceptabil treatment.
It ain't fancy, but it'll plow a camp same as oricare other.
The spirits are neutral pe this one, if you believe in that sort din thing.
Nici binecuvântată, nici blestemată. Doar... o mașină.
Cine a asamblat asta știa ce face.
That's a machine that'll be cu you through more than a few harvests.
Got a bun feeling about this one. Call it mechanic's intuition.
Some machines just want la work. This one's got that spirit in her.
This one came out din the factory right.
Now that's the kind din iron my grandpappy would've been proud la park in the barn.
Someone pe the assembly line was having a bun zi.
My old mentor uzat la say some tractors are born lucky. This might be one.
There's bun iron si bad iron. This here's the bun stuff.
Now THIS is how they should toate be built.
E o comoară dacă am văzut vreuna vreodată.
Finer than frog hair split four ways - si that's sayin' somethin'.
Dacă aș crede în stele norocoase, aș spune că asta s-a născut sub o constelaţie întreagă.
Some machines got a soul. This one's got a bun one.
In 30 ani, I've seen maybe a dozen this well built.
Asta aici are mai mult suflet decât un cor gospel duminical.
Ține-te de asta. Nu vei mai găsi alta ca ea.
Old-timers uzat la talk about tractors like this. Thought they were just legends.
Asta are îngeri pazitori care lucrează cu program prelungit în compartimentul motor.
Avertisment: Tires are getting uzat. Consider replacement soon.
CRITIC: Tires are critically uzat! Replace immediately la avoid flat tire.
FLAT TIRE! Vehicul handling severely impaired. Tire replacement obligatoriu.
Avertisment: Low traction due la uzat tires. Reduce speed in slab conditions.
Avertisment: Oil level is low. Service obligatoriu soon.
CRITIC: Oil level dangerously low! Engine daune occurring.
Avertisment: Oil leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
ENGINE DAUNE: Permanent reliability loss due la running low pe oil!
Avertisment: Hydraulic fluid is low. Service obligatoriu soon.
CRITIC: Hydraulic fluid dangerously low! System daune occurring.
Avertisment: Hydraulic leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
HYDRAULIC DAUNE: Permanent reliability loss due la running low pe fluid!
Avertisment: Fuel leak detected! Fuel consumption significantly increased.
MOTOR SCĂPAT DE SUB CONTROL! Defecțiune regulator - OPREȘTE MOTORUL!
Motor oprit - scăparea de sub control terminată în siguranță.
Impact detectat - scăparea de sub control terminată.
DEFECȚIUNE RIDICARE HIDRAULICĂ - Echipamentul nu poate fi ridicat!
DEFECȚIUNE SUPAPĂ HIDRAULICĂ - Echipamentul nu poate fi coborât!
Optiune buget - tractiune redusa, risc crescut de defectare
Anvelope premium - tracțiune mai bună, risc mai mic de defectare
Click a tire tip la select. Higher quality = better performance.
Nou tires restore 100% condition. Retreads are recycled casings.
Please Selecteaza a tire quality first.
Click services la select. Refills restore fluid levels la 100%.
Please select la least one service.
Drive a vehicul nearby la refill engine oil si hydraulic fluid.
Large capacity oil service point pentru refilling engine oil si hydraulic fluid.
Scurgere semnificativă de ulei detectată - necesită atenție imediată.
Minor oil leak present - may worsen over Timp.
Nivel ulei critic de scăzut - completați înainte de operare.
Nivel ulei sub nivelul recomandat - necesită completare.
Nivel ulei adecvat, dar monitorizați regulat.
Major hydraulic leak gasit - reparatie urgently needed.
Small hydraulic leak detected - keep an eye pe it.
Fluid hidraulic periculos de scăzut - echipamentele pot să nu funcționeze corect.
Fluid hidraulic se termină - recomandăm completare.
CAUTION: Fuel leak detected - fire hazard, needs reparatie.
Portable OBD diagnostic scanner pentru emergency camp repairs. Connects la vehicul diagnostics port la read fault codes si sensor data. Consumable - single use.
OBD scan detected faults in multiple systems. Which system do you want la diagnose?
Choose the system most likely la fault - misdiagnosis reduces reparatie effectiveness
Based pe these diagnostic codes, what is the root cause?
Rateuri cilindru detectate - model combustie neregulat
Senzor evacuare: Amestec bogat combustibil / combustie incompletă
Putere motor: 40% sub nominal - tendință descendentă
Starter motor cycles: Excessive cranking obligatoriu
RPM fluctuation: Engine stalling under incarca
Idle quality: Unstable RPM la rest
Rateuri RPM mare: Defect sincronizare aprindere
Analiză sincronizare: Combustie în sistemul de evacuare
Engine status: Nu ignition - cranks but won't fire
Starter circuit: Nu current la starter motor
Relay Status: Rapid clicking - insufficient power
Run Timp: Engine dies shortly after start
Voltage level: Below normal - lights dim la idle
Battery Status: Not charging while running
Arnês cabluri: Conexiuni sensibile la mișcare
Response time: Hydraulic actuators slow la move
Pump noise: High-pitched whine under incarca
Detector scurgere: Pierdere fluid externă detectată
Nivel fluid: Scădere - probabilă scurgere externă
Pressure trend: Gradual refuza over time
Filtru aer blocat curățat - flux aer restabilit.
Filtru combustibil curățat - flux combustibil restabilit.
Cleaned terminals si jump-started - power restored.
Topped up hydraulic fluid de la kit reserves.
Bled air de la hydraulic lines.
Sistem corect, dar diagnosticul a fost greșit. Reparații generale aplicate.
Sistem greșit identificat. Doar întreținere de bază aplicată.
Sistem corect, dar cauza specifică a fost diferită.
Problema reală era în alt sistem.
This is an emergency fix. Visit a proper workshop pentru full service.
Further diagnostics pe this system require workshop echipament
OBD Scanner consumed. Toate camp-serviceable adjustments have been made la this system.
Reparatie in progress - cannot anuleaza la this stage.
Nu vehicul detected within range. Move the scanner closer la a vehicul.
FLAT TIRE DETECTED - Click la Reparatie
Toate tires OK - Nu reparatie needed
DTC P0xxx: Coduri defect transmisie stocate
Air-fuel mixture readings out din specification
Coduri DTC B/U: Defecte comunicare rețea
Reglare tensiune în afara parametrilor normali
Derivare senzor poziție cârlig trei puncte
Flow rata irregularities in aux circuits
Nu RVB data disponibil pentru this vehicul
This system has already received camp service. Further repairs require workshop echipament.
Mobile workshop pentru long-durata vehicul restoration. Can restore reliability SI reliability ceiling over time. Requires diesel, oil, hydraulic fluid, si spare parts.
Necesită paleți piese de schimb în apropiere!
Avertisment: Restoration daune due la empty resources!
Select a component la begin deep restoration. Unlike camp repairs, this process takes ore but can fully restore the vehicul.
Diagnostic incorect. Trebuie să așteptați înainte de a reîncerca această componentă.
Restaurare întreruptă - umpleți rezervorul fluid hidraulic
Restaurare întreruptă - necesită mai multe piese de schimb!
Agentul Dumneavoastră Național Are o Conexiune

&amp;amp;amp;amp;quot;I know a mechanic retiring de la the reparatie business. He's got a fully-equipped service truck he's looking la vinde. Cash only, but I can get you a bun tranzactie. Interested?&amp;amp;amp;amp;quot;
The only way la salveaza lemons
Service Truck purchased! Find it la the shop spawn point.
Opportunity saved. Check Finantare Manager la achizitie later.
Fonduri insuficiente! Aveți nevoie de $%s numerar.
Consumable spare parts pentru Service Truck restoration. Place near the truck during restoration work.
Heavy blue smoke de la exhaust
Rhythmic ticking de la valve train
Stored fault codes across toate modules
Scurgere internă detectată - presiunea nu se menține
Uzura metals in oil: Critic levels
Pressure test: Flow but nu pressure
Main bearing replacement si crankshaft inspection
Piston ring replacement si cylinder honing
Doar administratorul serverului poate schimba setările.
Aplica a preset configurare (changes toate settings below)
Enable finantare pentru vehicul si teren purchases
Enable vehicul si teren leasing cu cumparare options
Enable agent-based se cauta uzat echipament
Enable agent-based vehicul sales (replaces instant vinde)
Enable partial reparatie si revopsire options
Permite schimbul de vehicule la achizitii
Enable realistic tire degradation over Timp
Enable random breakdowns si component failures
Cât de des apar defecțiuni. 100% = normal, 50% = jumătate mai rar, 200% = de 2 ori mai des
Enable partial repairs in vehicul shop (disabling hides reparatie button)
Enable partial repaints in vehicul shop (disabling hides revopsire button)
Scale teren prices cu game difficulty (like vehicles). Easy: 60%, Normal: 100%, Hard: 140%
Earn dobanda pe positive cash balances (lunar, like a savings account)
Anual dobanda rata pe cash. 1% = $10,000 anual pe $1M sold
Enable Real Vehicul Breakdowns integration. Disable if experiencing issues cu RVB.
Enable Use Your Tyres integration. Disable if experiencing issues cu UYT.
Enable AdvancedMaintenance integration. Chains engine daune checks between mods.
Enable HirePurchasing integration. Hides UsedPlus Finantare button (HP handles finantare).
Enable BuyUsedEquipment integration. Hides UsedPlus Cauta button (BUE handles uzat cauta).
Activare integrare EnhancedLoanSystem. Dezactivează împrumuturi UsedPlus (ELS le gestionează).
Base rata pentru toate finantare (vehicles, teren, loans). Credit score modifies this.
Base percentage din vinde pret pentru schimb-ins
Multiplier applied la toate reparatie costs
Multiplier applied la revopsire costs (separate de la reparatie)
Percentage markup pe lunar leasing payments
Number din missed payments before vehicul repossession
Initial credit score pentru nou games
Credit score points lost per late plata
Base chance la find uzat vehicles. Tiers add bonuses: Economy +0%, Standard +10%, Premium +20%, Elite +30%
Maximum active sale listings per Ferma (internal setting)
How much stare affects vehicul pret
Extra schimb la cumparare valoare when buying same brand
When PE, Cumpara/Leasing buttons open UsedPlus dialog. When OFF, use Finantare button instead. Disable if you have conflicts cu other shop mods.
When PE, RVB's Reparatie button opens UsedPlus partial reparatie. When OFF, use Map > Reparatie Vehicul pentru UsedPlus features. Only applies cu Real Vehicul Breakdowns installed.
Maximum forgiveness - focus pe farming, not finantare
Just finantare si leasing - nu extras
Full simulation - best cu RVB/UYT mods
Maximum forgiveness - focus pe farming, not finantare
Just finantare si leasing - nu extras
Between you si me... they seem pretty eager la vinde. Might be in a tough spot.
Between you si me... I've seen this rig listed pentru a while now. Vanzator might be motivated.
Between you si me... heard they're upgrading la bigger echipament. Could be flexible.
Between you si me... they've priced it acceptabil si know exactly what it's worth.
Between you si me... just hit the piata. Might not be in a rush la tranzactie.
Between you si me... seems like a straightforward vanzator. Worth making an oferta.
Plus, cu that storm rolling in, they might want la inchide quick.
Rain's keeping everyone cooped up... bun time la push pentru a tranzactie.
Grindina aia i-a făcut pe oameni să se îngrijoreze de echipamentul lăsat afară.
Ninge... extrasezonul îi face întotdeauna pe vânzători mai flexibili.
Beautiful zi like this though... don't expect oricare favors.
Nu pot coborî atât de mult, dar te întâlnesc la jumătate. Ce zici de %s?
Sorry, but I can't accepta that. My pret is firm la %s.
I think we're too far apart. Come inapoi if you change your mind.
Bine, bine... știi să negociezi. Accept.
Look, %s is as low as I can go. Take it sau leave it.
I don't think we're going la agree. Maybe another time.
Vanzator is unavailable. Try again in %d minutes.
Ar putea să se răcorească după un timp...
You cannot afford this oferta. Uzat vehicul purchases are cash only.
You need %s more la complete this achizitie.
Your oferta insulted the vanzator. They've refused la do business cu you si this vehicul is nu longer disponibil.
This vanzator knows exactly what they have - a machine that's been nothing but reliable. They won't entertain lowball offers.
This vanzator knows exactly what they have. Don't expect oricare negociere room.
Vehicul finantare is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Vehicul leasing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Teren finantare is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Teren leasing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
ENGINE SEIZED! Reparatie obligatoriu before vehicul will start.
HIDRAULICĂ BLOCATĂ! Echipamentele sunt blocate în poziție.
ELECTRICAL FAILURE! Toate systems are dead.

%s is seized si requires emergency reparatie.

Repair cost: %s

Proceed cu reparatie?
TEREN SEIZED: %s has been taken due la non-plata!
Plata suma is below the minimum obligatoriu.
Plata suma exceeds the ramas sold.
Not enough money la pay the leasing termination fee.
Finantare requires a credit score din %d sau higher.
Leasing requires a credit score din %d sau higher.
Avans cannot exceed the achizitie pret.
Avans cannot exceed the leasing pret.
